calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.description: MECH-104: Surprise-Gated Volatility Interrupt (committed-only fix). Restricts both interrupt policies to committed steps only, breaking EXQ-062 positive feedback loop.
SD-005: Latent Information Separation Probe (design fix). Round-robin action assignment + binary contact probe with balanced sampling + 500 probe steps. Fixes EXQ-047c flaws.

items.title: Contributor Onboarding -- Pipeline Smoke Test (Daniel-PC)
items.notes: Fixed: agent.device must be updated after .to(gpu) since config defaults to cpu.
